description: I believe Logsign is a real challenger in SIEM market.

pros: high visualization, automated incident response, legal obligations, unlimited data collection and storage
cons: lack of an agent of its own as a log collection tool

description: We have been using logsign hotspot solution almost one year. We covered our problem with this product. They have good customer support team.
author: Bekir S.
Evre T.
pros: The brand is very flexible which makes it also very productive. The employees are energitic and motivated. Getting any support needed, even before becoming a customer is very effective. The software is very easy to use.
cons: On customer side still need retention. For SMB there are cheaper solutions, at which customers you are not able to push the quality, but the price.

author: Mustafa B.
pros: The SIEM software is very easy and user friendly. Also threat database is updated everyday.
cons: Office 365 Integration but you have to know the Microsoft don't give you API for Office 365 to Vendor.

description: We can take many ready reports when The correlation happened

cons: Maybe they can improve some forensic reports for easy analyze

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Works stable and it is very robust. Administration not complex and the guides is easy. Support line (technical people) are enough expert, satisfied.
cons: Will be good to expand more functionalities (tools) to become a suite, a full SIEM.

description: We have lots of referancial customer and customer satisfaction.

pros: Logsign is Very Good at Correlation of logs

review_title: Best software for SIEM at Turkey for Enterprise Companies
description: Best software for SIEM at Turkey for Enterprise Companies. We are using SIEM and 5651 (in Turkey). We recommend to all companies. This is elastic, useful. The support team is good. You can contact them every time.

description: I like it. Easy install , easy setup, easy manage , low resource and changeble module. Fast report

description: We can identify problems with our simple to use and extremely fast results. What is happening in the particular network layer. All incoming attacks, the firewall is able to view everything from reaction to comments.

description: We met with Logsign in 2015. We tried to product. The product is superior from its competitors. When buying a product , it is important to get the technical support. Logsign have very good technical support team. Thanks to Logsign.
author: Onur U.

description: I have been working for Data Market for 3 years as a Technology Consultant. Sometimes, our customers would like to get a SIEM solution from us and we suggest them to use Logsign as a SIEM product. We sold them these solutions several times and get good feedbacks from our customers. Their technicals persons have very good knowledge about their products and Logsign customer support servives are also great. Thanks for them.

description: we are using logsign as hotspot product in some of our projects. This product solved lots of problems in our customers. Also very good customer support.
